scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w web" "npm run dev -w pm-ai-tool-server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @pm-ai-tool/shared && npm run build -w web
scripts.e2e:stack: REQUEST_LOG=0 npm run build && concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run start -w pm-ai-tool-server" "npx wait-on -t 120000 http://127.0.0.1:3001/health && npm run preview -w web -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173"
